name: Caesar Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Anchovy fillets (2 oz each, drained and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg, salt, pepper, garlic powder, anchovies, MSG, oil, and mustard in a large bowl.
2. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Mix in steak sauce, hot pepper sauce, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, catsup, and remaining 1 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice.
4. Beat the dressing until blended and thick.
5. Makes 5 1/2 cups
